projects.name: Biomechanics Analysis Pipeline for Cricket Bowling
projects.description: Built a computer vision pipeline using YOLOv8 for object detection and SMPL for 3D body mesh estimation

projects.description: Designed a hybrid retrieval pipeline combining dense vector search with sparse BM25 retrieval and GPT-4o based reasoning

projects.description: Built a full stack platform that ingests athlete telemetry via Strava API and applies time series analysis

projects.description: Implemented an Alternating Least Squares based collaborative filtering recommendation system and a K-Means clustering based anomaly detection pipeline

experience.role: Software Engineering and Generative AI Intern
key_points: Engineered a modular AI verification pipeline applying statistical hypothesis testing and systematic evaluation
Built and evaluated a multimodal model pipeline processing data from 30 plus internal sources

achievements: Top 5 of 50 Teams in Hackverse Hackathon organized by IBM SkillsBuild and AWS
Solved 100 plus problems on LeetCode in Python across Data Structures and Algorithms
resume_data.summary: Ayushman Chakraborty is a final year B.Tech Computer Science student at MIT Bangalore with a strong foundation in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and applied research methodology. He has production internship experience at Wipro and has worked on various projects, including computer vision pipelines, retrieval augmented generation, and time series forecasting models. He is proficient in Python, model building, and has a strong understanding of statistical hypothesis testing and model evaluation.
